title: Tradable Wind Burst
description: This datapack lets you buy the Wind Burst enchantment.
body:
# Tradable Wind Burst
**Obtaining the Wind Burst enchantment in vanilla Minecraft is very difficult. If you're looking for a straightforward way to acquire it, the villager trading option added by this datapack is an excellent choice.**
> **It simply lets you buy the Wind Burst enchantment from Librarians. That's all.** 🙃
